mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE node_hierarchy AS ( -- 锚定节点 SELECT id, node_name, node_type, parent_id, is_enabled, is_deleted, created_at, creator_id FROM org_node WHERE id IN
#{id}
AND is_deleted = 0 AND is_enabled = 1
UNION ALL
-- 递归向上查父节点 SELECT parent.id, parent.node_name, parent.node_type, parent.parent_id, parent.is_enabled, parent.is_deleted, parent.created_at, parent.creator_id FROM org_node parent INNER JOIN node_hierarchy child ON parent.id = child.parent_id WHERE parent.id != 0 AND parent.is_deleted = 0 ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM node_hierarchy
